voteDescription: **Captain {initiator}** has called for **{target}** to walk the plank! All hands on deck, cast yer votes!
votePassedDescription: The crew has spoken! **{target}** has been thrown overboard for **{duration} minutes**. Davy Jones sends his regards.
voteExpiredDescription: The mutiny against **{target}** has failed. Only {votes}/{needed} scallywags showed up. Cowards, the lot of ye.
userMutedDescription: **{target}** has been gagged and thrown in the brig for **{duration} minutes**. Arrr.
dmDescription: The crew of **{server}** voted ye into Davy Jones' locker for **{duration} minutes**. Yer crimes against the ship will not be forgotten.
dmTip: Ye can buy yer freedom by boostin' the server. One hour of immunity, savvy?
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: **{executor}** tried to spring **{target}** from the brig without the captain's orders! Throw 'em in too!
selfMuteReactions: The scallywag voted to walk their OWN plank?! Madness!
Arr, they've thrown themselves overboard! No one asked ye to do that!
The crew is confused. Why would ye mutiny against yerself?
Self-keel-hauling. That's a new one for the captain's log.
Ye absolute barnacle. Voting against yerself. Legend.
footerText: Cast yer vote below, ye scurvy dogs
